# DOW-UAP-D19, Mission Report, Syria, February 21, 2023 - Page 1

~~SECRET//NOFORN~~
Declassified by MG Richard A. Harrison
USCENTCOM Chief of Staff
Declassified on: 8 October 2025

# Misrep undefined-8353978

## Narrative

***MSN AMENDS: [1.4a] / DCA / ESSA / 0000-0334z v 0000-0300z / +0+34 extension d2 WL81 CANX / EE Ops, KN, KT, AL, EN APPV'D***

~~(S//REL TO USA, FVEY)~~ 2320Z- [1.4a] FLT, A 2-SHIP OF F-15E, TOOK OFF FROM MUWAFFAQ SALTI AIR BASE (OJMS) ISO OPERATION INHERENT RESOLVE TO CONDUCT DCA IVO ESSA. MISSION WAS NOT FLOWN AS FRAGGED D2 MSN AMENDS.

~~(S//REL TO USA, FVEY)~~ 2338Z- [1.4a] FLT C2 CHECK IN W/ KINGPIN.

~~(S//REL TO USA, FVEY)~~ 2345Z- [1.4a] FLT AIR REFUELED W/ [1.4a] RECEIVING 37K LBS (COMBINED TOTAL) OF FUEL (MOM TRACK).

~~(S//REL TO USA, FVEY)~~ 0003Z- [1.4a] FLT CHECKED ON STATION W/ KINGPIN AND PROCEEDED TO CONDUCT DCA IVO ESSA.

(S//NF) 0021Z-0024Z - [1.4a] RECEIVED MFT RADAR JAMMING IVO SHADDADI [1.4a] [1.4a] AT FL270. NTFR.

~~(S//NF)~~ 0025Z- [1.4a] OBS 3X POSS UAP IVO SHADDADI [1.4a] AT FL240. WSV PRODUCED. NFTR.

~~(S//REL TO USA, FVEY)~~ 0134Z- [1.4a] FLT AIR REFUELED W/ [1.4a] RECEIVING 33.5K LBS (COMBINED TOTAL) OF FUEL (GANDER TRACK).

~~(S//REL TO USA, FVEY)~~ 0135Z- [1.4a] OBS 1X POSS BALLOON IVO SHADDADI [1.4a] [1.4a] AT FL210. WSV PRODUCED. NFTR.

~~(S//REL TO USA, FVEY)~~ 0226Z- [1.4a] AIR REFUELED W/ [1.4a] RECEIVING 11K LBS FUEL (GANDER TRACK).

~~(S//REL TO USA, FVEY)~~ 0340Z- [1.4a] FLT CHECKED OFF STATION W/ KINGPIN.

~~(S//REL TO USA, FVEY)~~ 0340Z- [1.4a] FLT C2 CHECK OUT W/ KINGPIN AND RTB.

~~(S//REL TO USA, FVEY)~~ 0425Z- [1.4a] FLT LANDED AT OJMS W/ ESD AT 0435Z. NSTR.

~~(S//RELIDO)~~ Mission Narrative

| 3.5c, FOIA Exemption (b)(6) |
| :--- |

~~SECRET//NOFORN~~

MDR 25-0094 thru MDR 25-0099 / JS-250710-TM8S                                                                                              10/17/25 001
Approved for Release to AARO

# DOW-UAP-D19, Mission Report, Syria, February 21, 2023 - Page 9

Declassified by MG Richard A. Harrison
USCENTCOM Chief of Staff
Declassified on: 8 October 2025

~~SECRET//NOFORN~~

* **Mission Impact:** NONE
* **JSIR Report ID:** 340377
* **Global Campaign Plan:**

### GENTEXT/EMI

* **Gentext:** (S//NF) 0021Z-0024Z - [1.4a] RECEIVED MFT RADAR JAMMING IVO SHADDADI [1.4a] AT FL270. NFTR.

(S//NF) THIS EVENT IS STANDARD ON AZIMUTH, MFT RADAR JAMMING EXPERIENCED BY AIRCREW NORTH OF SHADDADI. OUR WORKING THEORY IS THAT IT IS AN AERA OF EFFECT TURKISH X-BAND JAMMER ON OR ACROSS THE SYR/TUR BORDER INTO TURKEY.

### AIRSIGHT

* **DTG:** 210025:00ZFEB23
* **Coords Start:** [1.4a]
* **Coords End:** [1.4a]
* **Altitude:** FL240
* **Duration:**
* **Lateral CPA:**
* **Horizontal CPA:**
* **Aircraft Type:** 3x POSS UAP
* **Aircraft Number:**
* **Country of Origin:**

### GENTEXT/AIRSIGHT

* **Gentext:** (S//NF) 0025Z- [1.4a] OBS 3X POSS UAP IVO SHADDADI [1.4a] AT FL240. WSV PRODUCED. NFTR.

(S//NF) [1.4a] WAS CRUSING IN CAP AT FL270. NO RADAR RETURNS RECEIVED FROM UAP. NO HEALTH EFFECTS EXPERIENCED BY AIRCREW. 2 WHITE OBJECTS IR SIGNIFICANT. NFTR.

### WEATHER

* **Weather:** CLOUDY.

### AIRSIGHT

* **DTG:** 210135:00ZFEB23
* **Coords Start** [1.4a]

***
